summary: NAS100 in corrective phase from 52-week high 29,782. D1 bearish MSS developing with lower highs. H4 shows bearish FVG 29,012-29,603 still unmitigated. M15 compression detected. recommendation: NO_GO — Walker confidence 48/100 below 70 threshold. ORB score 58/100 borderline. Bearish bias is valid but entry quality insufficient. Wait for NY AM (21:30 HKT) to establish clearer M15 OB before committing.
